basics.name: Godfrey Ogembo
basics.label: Backend Engineer
basics.summary: Cloud Engineer with 2+ years of experience in backend development and Cloud Infrastructure automation. Passionate about distributed collaboration, community mentorship, and solving complex problems from first principles.

work.name: EveOps - Everything operations
work.summary: Moderated and guided a community of 300+ cloud engineers, coordinating technical events and skill development initiatives.
responsibilities: Community Leadership: Moderated and directed a community of 300+ cloud engineers and enthusiasts, guiding overall strategy and streamlining the onboarding process for newcomers.

Technical Event Management: Coordinated 3 technical webinars (personally hosting 1) over a two-month period focusing on AWS Zero Trust architecture, cloud deployment, and agentic IaC, averaging 60 live attendees per session and driving 30+ new community registrations.
Skill Development Initiatives: Co-managed a 30-day Terraform challenge, providing ongoing technical support and code review to help members build practical infrastructure-as-code proficiency.

work.name: Victoria Sentinel
work.summary: Engineered and deployed a highly-available Python backend on AWS to facilitate real-time IoT data ingestion.
responsibilities: Engineered and deployed a highly-available Python backend (Flask) on AWS (EC2, S3, API Gateway) to facilitate real-time IoT data ingestion and visualization for pilot fish farms.
Implemented scalable architecture and employed Agile development practices to manage the full project lifecycle from concept to production.
Ensured system resilience and performance through rigorous testing and Linux-based server administration.

work.name: KidsCodelab
work.summary: Directed data-driven, hands-on programming labs and coding symposia for 60+ learners, driving strong technical engagement and foundational skill development.
responsibilities: Event Coordination & Outreach: Organized coding symposia and "kidathons" across multiple centers in Homa Bay, delivering hands-on technical instruction and career exposure to 61 unique learners per assessment cycle.

Hands-On Mentorship: Directed project-based programming labs using industry-standard tools like VS Code; achieved a 67% top-tier engagement rating via gamified mechanics and led 84% of students to report strong pride in their technical creations.

Data-Driven Instruction: Calibrated curriculum difficulty using direct feedback—ensuring 84% of learners found the pacing optimal—and dynamically adapted lesson plans to close identified knowledge gaps in latency, live troubleshooting, and machine learning.

Student Success & Industry Alignment: Fostered early career readiness through local industry connections and insights, achieving a 79% high-clarity rating for instructional delivery while building long-term student resilience.

projects.name: AI-Powered Digital Trade Companion
projects.description: Developed a containerized backend using modern Python’s FastAPI to support an AI-driven application for cross-border traders in East Africa.
highlights: Integrated Generative AI capabilities to provide real-time, context-aware assistance.
Focused on high-performance REST APIs and robust data management.
